name: APT Investigation
description: Full APT threat assessment — intel, forensics, IOC analysis, executive report

tasks.task: Research the threat actor involved in {context}. Map all known TTPs to MITRE ATT&CK framework. Identify the actor's motivation, sophistication level, and known campaigns.
Analyze the IOCs and forensic indicators from {context}. Identify lateral movement, persistence mechanisms, and data exfiltration paths. Document the full attack chain.
Assess the organizational risk from {context}. Evaluate potential business impact, data exposure, regulatory implications, and recommend prioritized remediation actions.
Write a concise executive incident briefing for {context}. Include: situation summary, business impact, response actions taken, and recommended next steps. Keep it under 500 words.
